problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: Combining Bacteriophage surface display for targeting with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
